headline: Accenture (ACN) Valuation Check After Q2 Earnings Beat And Expanded AI Partnerships
summary: Accenture (ACN) is back in focus after its latest quarterly report paired higher year-over-year sales and profit with updated fiscal 2026 guidance, along with a flurry of AI-focused deals and partnerships. See our latest analysis for Accenture. Despite a steady stream of AI partnerships, acquisitions and a higher fiscal 2026 outlook, Accenture’s 30 day share price return of 7.12% and 90 day share price return of 26.13% decline, alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 33.42% decline,...

headline: Accenture Federal Services Wins NOAA Contract to Modernize National Weather Service Forecast Operations
summary: WASHINGTON, March 24, 2026--Accenture Federal Services (AFS), a wholly owned subsidiary of Accenture (NYSE: ACN), has been selected to support the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration’s (NOAA) National Weather Service (NWS) replacement of Advanced Weather Interactive Processing System (AWIPS) with NWS HIVE (Hydrometeorological Interactive Virtual Environment). [NOAA release]
